channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: iPhone 18 Pro Battery Leak Reveals Big Changes
item.description: The iPhone 18 Pro's battery capacities have leaked, with eSIM models getting a larger cell. This expansion to Europe benefits millions of buyers.

item.title: iOS 27 Introduces Standalone Siri App
item.description: iOS 27 will feature a standalone Siri app, allowing users to interact with Siri more effectively. This marks a significant shift in Apple's approach to voice assistance.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 Leaks Ahead of Launch
item.description: The Galaxy Z Fold8 is set to debut in July, with leaks suggesting a wide-screen design. Anticipation builds for Samsung's next foldable innovation.

item.title: Riot Games Celebrates Pride 2026
item.description: Riot Games is celebrating Pride month with new in-game content and community collaborations. This initiative highlights LGBTQIA+ representation across their games.

item.title: Toyota Unveils 2027 GR86 Enhancements
item.description: The 2027 Toyota GR86 debuts with performance enhancements and new features at FuelFest. These updates aim to elevate the driving experience for enthusiasts.

item.title: Intel Launches Arc G3 Processors for Handhelds
item.description: Intel's new Arc G3 series targets gaming handhelds, competing with AMD's Ryzen Z-series. These processors are designed for optimal gaming performance.

item.title: Engineer Creates AI Laser Mosquito Defense
item.description: An engineer developed an AI-driven laser system that effectively eliminates mosquitoes. This innovative approach uses deep learning for targeting.

item.title: PS5 Offers Free First-Party Game for Limited Time
item.description: Sony is offering a free first-party PS5 game, Marathon, starting June 2. Despite good reviews, the game struggled commercially since its release.

item.title: AMD Announces Ryzen 7 5800X3D Anniversary Edition
item.description: AMD confirms the Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition, launching June 25 for $349. This re-release features advanced 3D V-Cache technology.
